name: Waldine's Red Beans and Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Red beans; rinse and sort
1 lb Turkey or smoked sausage; cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions: You may soak your beans or not. I don't. Place the beans in a pot with water, onions, bell pepper, celery, green onions, garlic, seasonings, and meats (except sausage). Cook until the beans are tender, about 2 to 3 hours. About 15 minutes before the beans are done, add the sausage. You can add a little Wondra to thicken the gravy at this point. Some people smash some beans on the side of the pot to help with thickening the gravy. Remove the bay leaf and serve over cooked rice. Pass the Tabasco for those who like more spice. Some people like to pour a little Hot Pepper Vinegar on top. We often have baked or fried pork chops served as a side dish.
